MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF JAMES QUINN's Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is off calendar per stipulation of parties. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
